path: PNGS/The hadith of ‘Ali being sent to deliver Bara’a.png
text: Narrated Anas bin Malic “The Prophet (#) sent Abu Bakr with the (announcement of) Bara'ah (the ‘declaration to publicize the disavowal of the idolaters). Then he summoned him and said: ‘it is not right for anyone to convey this except a man among ‘my family**So he called for ‘Al and gave it to him." Grade: Hasan (Darussalam) Reference : Jami® at-Tirmidhi 3090
